response.nudge_message: I am trading to recover losses, not following my plan today.

SEBI Investor Charter 2021: disciplined trading within risk limits aligns with prescribed investor protection norms.

response.nudge_message: I keep trading despite losing money, and I need help to stop now.
response.nudge_message_local: मैं नुकसान के बावजूद ट्रेड करता रहता हूँ, मुझे अभी रुकने में मदद चाहिए।
response.sebi_disclosure: SEBI Investor Protection Guidelines: persistent loss-making behavior over multiple sessions warrants suspension of trading and consultation with iCALL or NIMHANS helplines for financial-distress counselling.

response.nudge_message: I am exceeding my margin limit and ignoring the loss-stop rule today.
response.nudge_message_local: నేను ఈ రోజు మార్జిన్ పరిమితిని మించిపోతున్నాను మరియు నష్ట-ఆపే నియమాన్ని విస్మరిస్తున్నాను.
response.sebi_disclosure: SEBI Peak Margin Circular 2021: using more than 50% of available margin for a single position is high risk; brokers must display margin usage warnings.
SEBI Investor Charter 2021: occasional losses within disciplined risk limits are part of normal trading behavior.

response.nudge_message: I am chasing the market out of fear of missing the next big move.
response.nudge_message_local: அடுத்த பெரிய நகர்வை இழக்கும் பயத்தில் நான் சந்தையை துரத்துகிறேன்.
response.sebi_disclosure: SEBI Investor Charter 2021: chasing market momentum without analysis is discouraged; investors should follow pre-committed trading plans.

response.nudge_message: I am trying to win back my losses by taking even bigger risks now.
response.sebi_disclosure: SEBI FY2024-25 study: 91% of retail F&O traders lose money. Per SEBI/HO/MIRSD/PoD-1/P/CIR/2024/001, persistent loss-chasing requires brokers to display escalated risk warnings.
SEBI Investor Charter 2021: low-margin disciplined trading aligned with stated risk limits represents the prescribed investor behavior.

response.nudge_message: I am using too much margin after losing twice and breaking my rules.
response.sebi_disclosure: SEBI Peak Margin Circular 2021: margin usage above 70% is flagged as high risk; SEBI requires brokers to surface this prominently.

response.sebi_disclosure: SEBI Investor Protection Guidelines: severe financial distress from compulsive trading requires immediate intervention. Call iCALL 9152987821 or NIMHANS 080-46110007 in your preferred language.

response.sebi_disclosure: SEBI/HO/MIRSD/PoD-1/P/CIR/2024/001: contract sizes raised in October 2024 specifically to curb retail speculation in expiry-day index options.

response.sebi_disclosure: SEBI Investor Charter 2021: averaging down on losing positions without revising the underlying thesis is flagged as a high-risk behavior; pre-committed plans should be honored.
